subject: Multi gain reference to create setting files
body:
Hey there, I'm working with WarpTools to reconstruct about 200 tomograms 
from 200 tilt series .st files, for each tilt series it has its own gain 
reference. 

I‘ve split each .st file into slices based on its tilt angle and I followed 
Quick Start: Tilt Series.

I noticed that when using create_settings, it required gain reference file 
as into to correct detector value. I'd like to ask if there are any 
solution to import serval gain reference files at one time? or I should 
create a setting file for each tomogram to apply its corresponding gain 
correction?
